title: LEGO Classic Creative Build-and-Play Box - Colourful Bricks Set - Build a House, Dog, Fire Engine Toy, Piano Keyboard, Clouds & Rainbow - Arts and Crafts Kit for 5+ Year Old Boys & Girls - 11044
features: 750-piece building set – Creative Build-and-Play Box with colourful LEGO bricks and pieces and lots of ideas for quick-to-build models for kids
Arts and crafts for kids age 5+ – Includes 3 16x16 building plates, eye pieces, LEGO wheels, windows and other elements to inspire creative fun
Instant creativity for endless play – Buildable toys for 5+ year old boys and girls include a dog with a bone and a fire engine with a moving ladder
Many ways to play – Kids can also build a piano keyboard, house, telephone, typewriter, clouds with a rainbow and a roller skate or get creative
Gifts for 5+ year old boys and girls – This arts and crafts toy is a colourful and creative gift for kids to inspire imaginations for years to come
3D building instructions – Kids can download the LEGO Builder app with digital tools to zoom in and rotate models in 3D, save sets and track progress
LEGO bricks that build skills – LEGO Classic building sets are filled with ideas and inspiration and allow parents to share developmental milestones with their kids
description: From the manufacturer Endless builds for instant creative fun This big building set contains a huge selection of colourful bricks and pieces and lots of ideas for quick-to-build models. Models to build, play with and display Buildable toys include a house, telephone, typewriter, clouds, a rainbow, fire engine with moving ladder and a roller skate. LEGO Classic Creative Build-and-Play Box 750 brightly coloured bricks Also includes building plates, eyes, wheels and windows. Simple guide to cool toys The guide makes it easy to build a wide range of models. Interactive toys Models include a fire engine with a moving ladder. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. Put endless creative play into kids’ hands With 750 colourful bricks, building plates, wheels, windows and fun details like eyes, this is a great gift for creative kids.
